content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 23, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 23, 2026, focused on optimizing context management, refining the settings UI, and performing extensive dependency maintenance across the framework. Key improvements include reducing prompt bloat to support longer context windows and finalizing Android mobile integration.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Context Optimization & UI Refinement**
    *   Reduced prompt bloat in the action-planner and reflection pipeline to prevent context overflow ([#7013](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7013)).
    *   Polished the settings UI, including dropdown sizing, model picker updates, and header drag-strip fixes ([#7059](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7059)).
*   **Mobile & Platform Integration**
    *   Completed default role wiring for the Android application ([#7052](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7052)).
*   **Dependency & Infrastructure Maintenance**
    *   Performed widespread dependency updates, including `uuid` v14 ([#7046](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7046)), `gymnasium` v1.3.0 ([#7058](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7058)), `commander` v14 ([#7057](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7057)), and `typescript` v6 ([#7042](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7042)).
    *   Updated `vitest` to v4 across multiple packages ([#7043](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7043)) and bumped various Cargo and npm/yarn groups to maintain framework stability ([#7047](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7047), [#7045](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7045), [#7044](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7044)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Feature Additions:** [#7072](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7072) (Support for multi-calendar Google feeds).
*   **Dependency Updates:** [#7070](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7070), [#7069](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7069), [#7068](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7068), [#7067](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7067), [#7066](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7066), [#7065](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7065), [#7064](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7064), [#7063](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7063), [#7062](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7062), [#7061](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7061), [#7060](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7060).

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were closed during this period.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Agent Interoperability:** [#7073](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7073) addresses the need for a decentralized, private method for agents to verify state during interactions without leaking underlying data via local ZK proofs.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were identified.*
